title: This is the title
html:
This is the title

01/01/2000

This is the directory where my custom workflow will commit and pr new blogs into the app. Doing it this way to not incur a lot of charges for cloud sql since this is literally a personal website there is no need for it to cost me more than 5 bucks a month

all obby parsing can be done on entry to a blog item, just no api calls

all links must be valid so the workflow must also contain a list of links and alert the developer on publish if their link will not work eventually in the future maybe add it so it creates a node automatically, but i think i will leave that for tektite, this is a personal portfolio after all Blog
